task.title: Make hf-data filter deterministic
task.goal: Remove nondeterministic node filtering in hf-data so repeated pipeline runs produce stable filtered input sizes and easier debugging.
constraints: Bootstrap through AgentKit before code changes

summaries.content: Task bootstrapped through AgentKit pipeline: Remove nondeterministic node filtering in hf-data so repeated pipeline runs produce stable filtered input sizes and easier debugging.

evidence_refs.note: Repository task registered and approved for implementation entry.
